flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at California State University-Fresno rose 31% between 2007 and 2010 ($8.0k → $10.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at California State University-Fresno rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.7k → $7.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at California State University-Fresno fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at California State University-Fresno rose 56% between 2021 and 2024 (17.8% → 27.8%).
